Inlet Temp       | 04h | ok  |  7.1 | 23 degrees C
Exhaust Temp     | 01h | ok  |  7.1 | 31 degrees C
Temp             | 0Eh | ok  |  3.1 | 42 degrees C
Temp             | 0Fh | ok  |  3.2 | 44 degrees C
Fan1 RPM         | 30h | ok  |  7.1 | 3720 RPM
Fan2 RPM         | 32h | ok  |  7.1 | 3840 RPM
Voltage 1        | 50h | ok  | 10.1 | 12.1 Volts
Pwr Consumption  | 77h | ok  | 10.1 | 168 Watts
Current 1        | 6Ah | ok  | 10.1 | 0.8 Amps
PSU1 Status      | 70h | ok  | 10.1 | 0x0180
Status           | 00h | ns  |  7.1 | No Reading
